---
title: "CHAIN Site Urbanicity QC"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
    embed-resources: true
    dpi: 600
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)
library(here)
library(sf)
library(terra)
source(here("R", "blackmarble_urbanicity_functions.R"))

site_sf_file <- here(
    "data", "processed", "chain_data", "chain_site_sf_objects.rda"
)
blackmarble_manifest_file <- here(
    "data", "processed", "chain_data", "blackmarble_download_log.csv"
)

if (!file.exists(site_sf_file)) {
    stop(
        "Site sf object file not found: ", site_sf_file, "\n",
        "Run R/create_chain_site_sf_objects.R first."
    )
}
if (!file.exists(blackmarble_manifest_file)) {
    stop(
        "Black Marble manifest not found: ", blackmarble_manifest_file, "\n",
        "Run R/process_blackmarble_urbanicity_local.R first."
    )
}

load(site_sf_file)
blackmarble_manifest <- fread(
    blackmarble_manifest_file,
    na.strings = c("", ".", "NA")
)

stopifnot(
    exists("chain_site_sf_objects"),
    is.list(chain_site_sf_objects),
    length(chain_site_sf_objects) == 9L,
    all(vapply(chain_site_sf_objects, inherits, logical(1), "sf"))
)

site_order <- names(chain_site_sf_objects)

site_data <- rbindlist(lapply(site_order, function(object_name) {
    site_df <- copy(as.data.table(st_drop_geometry(chain_site_sf_objects[[object_name]])))
    site_df[, object_name := object_name]
    site_df
}), fill = TRUE)

site_data[, adm_year := as.integer(format(as.IDate(adm_date), "%Y"))]
site_data[, display_site := factor(display_site, levels = unique(display_site))]
```

## Site Counts

```{r site-counts}
site_data[, .(
    n_rows = .N,
    n_with_urbanicity = sum(!is.na(degree_urban)),
    n_missing_urbanicity = sum(is.na(degree_urban)),
    n_missing_gps = sum(is.na(longitude) | is.na(latitude)),
    years = paste(sort(unique(adm_year)), collapse = ", ")
), by = .(object_name, display_site, country)][order(display_site)]
```

## Urbanicity Distributions

```{r urbanicity-histograms}
#| fig-width: 9
#| fig-height: 8

ggplot(site_data[!is.na(degree_urban)], aes(x = degree_urban)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 30, fill = "#356A8A", color = "white", linewidth = 0.2) +
    facet_wrap(~ display_site, scales = "free_y") +
    labs(
        x = "Black Marble degree_urban",
        y = "Patient records"
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
    )
```


## Site-Year Maps

```{r map-functions}
read_site_blackmarble_raster <- function(manifest, site_name, target_year) {
    manifest_rows <- manifest[site == site_name & adm_year == target_year]
    manifest_rows <- manifest_rows[file.exists(local_path)]

    if (!nrow(manifest_rows)) {
        stop(
            "No cached Black Marble H5 files found for ", site_name,
            " in ", target_year, ". Run R/process_blackmarble_urbanicity_local.R first."
        )
    }

    raster_list <- lapply(manifest_rows$local_path, blackmarble_h5_to_raster)
    if (length(raster_list) == 1L) {
        return(raster_list[[1]])
    }

    do.call(terra::mosaic, c(raster_list, fun = "max"))
}

make_site_extent <- function(site_sf, support_geometry, buffer_deg = 0.08) {
    point_sf <- site_sf[!st_is_empty(site_sf), ]
    combined_bbox <- st_bbox(c(
        st_geometry(point_sf),
        st_geometry(support_geometry)
    ))

    terra::ext(
        combined_bbox[["xmin"]] - buffer_deg,
        combined_bbox[["xmax"]] + buffer_deg,
        combined_bbox[["ymin"]] - buffer_deg,
        combined_bbox[["ymax"]] + buffer_deg
    )
}

raster_to_plot_data <- function(blackmarble_raster, site_extent, adm_year) {
    blackmarble_raster <- terra::crop(blackmarble_raster, site_extent)
    names(blackmarble_raster) <- "radiance"

    raster_df <- as.data.table(terra::as.data.frame(
        blackmarble_raster,
        xy = TRUE,
        na.rm = FALSE
    ))
    raster_df[, `:=`(
        adm_year = adm_year,
        log_lights = fifelse(is.na(radiance), NA_real_, log(radiance + 1))
    )]

    raster_df
}

make_site_raster_data <- function(site_sf) {
    support_geometry <- attr(site_sf, "patient_support_geometry")
    if (!inherits(support_geometry, "sf")) {
        stop("Site object is missing patient_support_geometry attribute.")
    }

    site_extent <- make_site_extent(site_sf, support_geometry)
    site_name <- unique(st_drop_geometry(site_sf)[["source_site"]])
    site_years <- sort(unique(as.integer(format(as.IDate(site_sf$adm_date), "%Y"))))

    rbindlist(lapply(site_years, function(target_year) {
        blackmarble_raster <- read_site_blackmarble_raster(
            manifest = blackmarble_manifest,
            site_name = site_name,
            target_year = target_year
        )
        raster_to_plot_data(
            blackmarble_raster = blackmarble_raster,
            site_extent = site_extent,
            adm_year = target_year
        )
    }), fill = TRUE)
}

plot_site_year_map <- function(site_sf) {
    site_sf$adm_year <- as.integer(format(as.IDate(site_sf$adm_date), "%Y"))
    point_sf <- site_sf[!st_is_empty(site_sf), ]
    support_geometry <- attr(site_sf, "patient_support_geometry")
    raster_df <- make_site_raster_data(site_sf)


    ggplot() +
        geom_raster(
            data = raster_df,
            aes(x = x, y = y, fill = log_lights)
        ) +
        geom_sf(
            data = support_geometry,
            fill = NA,
            color = "white",
            linewidth = 0.35
        ) +
        geom_sf(
            data = point_sf,
            inherit.aes = FALSE,
            color = "deepskyblue",
            size = 1,
            alpha = 0.65
        ) +
        scale_fill_gradient2(
            low = "black",
            mid = "yellow",
            high = "red",
            midpoint = 4.5,
            na.value = "transparent"
        ) +
        coord_sf(expand = FALSE) +
        facet_wrap(~adm_year) +
        labs(
            title = unique(site_sf$display_site),
            fill = "log(lights + 1)"
        ) +
        theme_void(base_size = 10) +
        theme(
            plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
            strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
            legend.position = "bottom"
        )
}
```

```{r site-year-maps}
#| results: asis
#| fig-width: 10
#| fig-height: 7

for (object_name in site_order) {
  cat(
    "\n\n### ",
    unique(chain_site_sf_objects[[object_name]]$display_site),
    "\n\n",
    sep = ""
  )
  print(plot_site_year_map(chain_site_sf_objects[[object_name]]))
}
```
